response.original_title: My Amazing Journey to the Mountains
response.overview: Last year, I finally got the chance to do the annapurna base camp trek, and it became one of the best experiences of my life. I was excited but also a little nervous because it was my first long trek. Every day, I walked through beautiful forests, small villages, and peaceful mountain trails. The fresh air and green scenery made me feel calm and happy.
response.title: My Amazing Journey to the Mountains
